title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Holiday Club
questions.text: The holiday club is open from 8 a.m. for parents who start work early. Breakfast is available until 8:30. Children arriving later should eat before they come.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: Breakfast is only available for early arrivals.
options.B: All children must arrive before eight.
options.C: Parents can eat breakfast at the club.

questions.heading: Message from Bella to Theo
questions.text: Theo, I’ve spoken to the teacher about our missing worksheet. She says we can collect another copy tomorrow, but we need to finish it before Friday’s lesson.
questions.question: What has Bella found out?

options.A: They can get the worksheet again soon.
options.B: The teacher has cancelled Friday’s lesson.
options.C: They must find the original worksheet.

questions.explanation: The teacher will provide another copy tomorrow.

questions.heading: Town Library
questions.text: The children’s area is closed today while new shelves are fitted. Children may choose books from the display near the main desk, but story time will not take place.
questions.question: What can children do today?

options.A: Borrow books from a temporary display.
options.B: Attend story time beside the main desk.
options.C: Use the children’s area as usual.

questions.explanation: Children can choose books from the display near the desk.

questions.heading: From: Grandpa / Subject: Your bike
questions.text: I repaired the brakes on your bike, but the front tyre still loses air slowly. You can ride it to school tomorrow, but let’s replace the tyre at the weekend.
questions.question: What does Grandpa mean?

options.A: The bike can be used briefly before another repair.
options.B: The bike is too dangerous to ride tomorrow.
options.C: He has replaced every part of the bike.

questions.explanation: The bike can be used tomorrow, but the tyre still needs replacing.

questions.heading: School Photography Display
questions.text: Photos chosen for the display will be put up in the main corridor next week. If your photo is selected, please write a short sentence explaining where you took it.
questions.question: What should selected students do?

options.A: Provide information to go with their photo.
options.B: Take another photograph next week instead.
options.C: Put their photo in the corridor themselves.

questions.explanation: Selected students need to write a sentence about where the photo was taken.
